channel.title: itch.io Charity Bundles — Opportunities
channel.description: Auto-collected posts and jams related to charity/fundraisers on itch.io (fresh-only).

item.title: [JAMS] itch.io
item.description: Can you make a new chess game? [Round 2] Hosted by Alaisha Ch. 31 Joined Overview Community 2 Submissions open from 2026-07-18 16:00:00 to 2026-08-08 16:00:00 Submissions due in years months days hours minutes seconds Join jam Why this jam exists The Coding Cabana is a community
